notes: EPI wraps openags/paper-search-mcp as an external dependency.
EPI discovery and acquisition prefer the paper-search-mcp stdio server, then fall back to the paper-search CLI when MCP is unavailable, fails, or returns no discoverable papers.
Use EPI_PAPER_SEARCH_MCP_COMMAND and EPI_PAPER_SEARCH_MCP_ARGS to override the stdio server command; use EPI_PAPER_SEARCH_COMMAND for the CLI fallback.
